creator: cweimann@gmail.com
text:
Fetch fails. It appears they have re-arranged their download page.  The latest versions have been moved to github and the older versions, such as 9.16 are now at http://downloads.ghostscript.com/public/old-gs-releases/ 

=> Attempting to fetch http://downloads.ghostscript.com/public/ghostscript-9.16.tar.bz2
fetch: http://downloads.ghostscript.com/public/ghostscript-9.16.tar.bz2: Not Found
